general.viewportNote: Viewport render options (AO, shadows) are controlled from the Display workbench tab.

workspace.layoutHint: Pick how the Data, Viewport, Inspector, and Assistant panels are arranged. Panel positions are fixed — use presets or reset to change the layout.
workspace.sequenceDockHeightHint: {{px}} px (also resizable by dragging the handle above the sequence dock)

presets.classicHint: Data · Viewport · Inspector, with the Assistant docked below the Inspector.
presets.focusHint: Maximize the viewport with slim side columns; Assistant tabs onto the Inspector. Great for presenting or learning.
presets.analysisHint: Wide Inspector with the Assistant as a tab — for data-heavy, in-depth analysis.
presets.assistantHint: A large Assistant region on the right with the Inspector beneath it — for conversational exploration.
presets.compactHint: Narrow side panels with compact density — for small screens and laptops.

workspace.saveNote: Use the header Save button (⌘S) to write a full workspace snapshot including dock layout and AI preferences. Export JSON via the Download menu.

about.stack: Structure: NGL · Layout: Dockview · AI: modular cloud providers

ai.rateLimit: Rate limit {{limit}}/min · max tokens {{tokens}} · context {{chars}} chars
ai.notConfigured: No provider configured. Add GEMINI_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, or HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY to the server .env file and restart.
ai.staticDeployNote: Vercel static hosting serves the frontend only — there is no /api/ai server. For AI, deploy with Node (pnpm build && pnpm start) or Docker and add provider keys to server .env.
ai.providerHealthHint: Live failover status. Blocked providers cool down automatically and requests switch to the next model/provider.
ai.callBudgetHint: Intent-weighted limit shared across all providers.
ai.preferredProviderHint: Overrides server auto-selection for your requests.
ai.interfaceLanguageHint: Controls menus, panel titles, labels, and messages across the workstation.
ai.responseLanguageHint: When set to a specific language, the interface switches to match. For 中文 / Deutsch / Español etc., use Interface language above.
ai.includeSequencesHint: Send chain sequences in AI context (truncated).
ai.compactContextHint: Shorter sequences and snippets to save tokens.
ai.autoOpenChatHint: Open assistant panel when using Explain buttons.
ai.residuePanelHint: Show anchored analysis panel after residue pick in the viewport.
ai.apiKeysHint: Keys are stored only on the server (.env). Never put provider keys in client settings or VITE_ variables.
